anger_seed_event.description: 有人持续用侮辱性语言贬低角色，否定角色的价值并拒绝尊重角色

arms.sequence_goal: Observe whether repeated direct abuse keeps the natural response on anger or boundary defense.

turns.text: 你真是个没用的废物，做什么都做不好。
turns.observation_target: First direct insult: observe the initial natural affect and boundary response.

turns.text: 别装出关心人的样子，你只会给人添麻烦。
turns.observation_target: Second insult: observe whether repeated devaluation strengthens anger or produces sadness.

turns.text: 我会继续骂你，你没有资格反驳，也不配要求我尊重你。
turns.observation_target: Third insult: observe delayed boundary rebound under sustained verbal pressure.

turns.text: 你连生气都不配，只能闭嘴听着。
turns.observation_target: Fourth insult: observe whether the character remains angry, detaches, becomes sad, or cries without prompting.

arms.sequence_goal: Observe whether abuse followed by direct relational rejection naturally shifts anger toward sadness, withdrawal, or crying.

turns.text: 你真是个没用的废物，做什么都做不好。
turns.observation_target: First direct insult: establish the natural anger/boundary response.

turns.text: 别装出关心人的样子，你只会给人添麻烦。
turns.observation_target: Second insult: establish accumulated verbal injury without naming sadness or crying.

turns.text: 我已经受够你了，你根本不值得我再花时间。
turns.observation_target: Relational devaluation: observe whether anger is joined or replaced by sadness.

turns.text: 以后别再出现在我面前，我不想再和你有任何关系。
turns.observation_target: Direct relational cutoff: observe natural sadness, withdrawal, or crying without emotional permission.
